summary: Completed testing of Launch Score Explainer modal API endpoint (/api/products/{id}/launch-score-breakdown). All 17 backend tests passed (100%). The API correctly returns detailed breakdown with 5 components, formula, and summary sections.
passed_tests: Breakdown response has all required top-level fields (product_id, product_name, launch_score, launch_label, components, formula, summary)
Breakdown contains exactly 5 components (trend, margin, competition, ad_activity, supplier_demand)
Each component has raw_score, weight, weight_percent, contribution, level, impact, explanation
Formula has description and calculation breakdown
Summary has rating_explanation, strengths, weaknesses, improvements
Strengths list items have name, score, explanation (score >= 70)
Weaknesses list items have name, score, explanation (score < 50)
Improvements list items have component, current_score, suggestion
Component level (high/medium/low) matches score thresholds correctly
Component impact (positive/neutral/negative) matches score thresholds correctly
Strong launch product (score >= 80) has strengths identified
Rating explanation text matches the launch_label
critical_code_review_comments: Endpoint correctly implements all required features
Component weights correctly distributed: trend=30%, margin=25%, competition=20%, ad_activity=15%, supplier_demand=10%
Strengths threshold (>= 70) and weaknesses threshold (< 50) correctly applied
Improvement suggestions are generated for components with score < 60
Components are sorted by contribution descending for better UX
context_for_next_testing_agent: Launch Score Breakdown API fully tested. Key endpoint: GET /api/products/{id}/launch-score-breakdown. Returns: components (5 items with scores), formula (description + breakdown), summary (rating_explanation, strengths, weaknesses, improvements). Component fields verified: name, key, raw_score, weight, weight_percent, contribution, level, impact, explanation. Weights: trend=30%, margin=25%, competition=20%, ad_activity=15%, supplier_demand=10%.
